title: CUT Packet Telemetry
description: Per-packet metadata extracted by the CUT relay (WIRE fields) with optional engine enrichment (COMPUTED fields). Patent ref: US 12,309,132 B1, FIG.1 elements 114 (relay) and 120 (time-series DB).

_metadata.description: Schema metadata. Not a packet field.

source.description: Extraction layer that produced this message. Determines which COMPUTED fields may be present.

src_port.description: WIRE. Source TCP port. Ephemeral (49152-65535 on macOS).

dst_port.description: WIRE. Destination TCP port. Service identifier.

timestamp_epoch.description: WIRE. Capture timestamp, nanosecond Unix epoch. Relay uses gettimeofday() at capture point.

ttl.description: WIRE. IP Time to Live. OS fingerprint (64=macOS/Linux, 128=Windows). Observed-initial delta = hop count.

ip_id.description: WIRE. IP identification field. OS fingerprint (0x0000 with DF=macOS, incrementing=Linux).

ip_len.description: WIRE. Total IP datagram length including headers.

dscp.description: WIRE. Differentiated Services Code Point. Traffic class (0=best effort, 46=EF/VoIP).

ecn.description: WIRE. Explicit Congestion Notification. Network congestion signal from routers.

df.description: WIRE. Don't Fragment flag. False on TCP = possible evasion via fragmentation.

ip_proto.description: WIRE. IP protocol number. 6=TCP, 17=UDP. Anomalous protocols are trust signals.

tcp_flags_hex.description: WIRE. Raw TCP flags byte as hex. 0x0002=SYN, 0x0012=SYN-ACK, 0x0010=ACK, 0x0018=PSH-ACK, 0x0011=FIN-ACK.

tcp_flags_str.description: WIRE. TCP flags as visual string with dots for unset bits.

tcp_flags_cwr.description: WIRE. Congestion Window Reduced flag. ECN response.

seq_raw.description: WIRE. Absolute TCP sequence number. On SYN packets this is the ISN.

ack_raw.description: WIRE. Absolute TCP acknowledgment number. 0 on initial SYN.

win_value.description: WIRE. Raw TCP window size before scaling. 0 = zero window (Lab 3 trust signal).

tcp_payload_len.description: WIRE. TCP payload bytes. The 'len' in patent tuple {src/dest/len/timestamp}.

tcp_hdr_len.description: WIRE. TCP header length. 20 base + options. Change mid-connection = anomaly.

urgent_ptr.description: WIRE. TCP urgent pointer. Nonzero = suspicious (covert channels, exploits).

mss.description: WIRE. Maximum Segment Size. SYN only. Network path MTU signal (16344=loopback, 1460=ethernet).

wscale.description: WIRE. Window scale factor. SYN only. OS fingerprint (6=macOS, 7=Linux).

ts_val.description: WIRE. TCP timestamp value. Sender clock. Initial value and tick rate are OS fingerprints.

ts_ecr.description: WIRE. TCP timestamp echo reply. Reflects peer ts_val. Enables RTT measurement.

tcp_options_raw.description: WIRE. Raw TCP options bytes. Preserves option order for OS fingerprinting (p0f-style).

time_delta.description: COMPUTED. Optional. Inter-packet arrival time in seconds. Derive: current.timestamp_epoch - previous.timestamp_epoch for same 4-tuple.

frame_len.description: COMPUTED. Optional. Total frame bytes including link header. Derive: ip_len + link_header_size (4 lo0, 14 ethernet).

protocols.description: COMPUTED. Optional. Protocol stack string. Derive: ip_proto lookup + port heuristics.

tcp_stream.description: COMPUTED. Optional. Stream reassembly index. Derive: hash(4-tuple) or use Kafka message key.

is_retransmit.description: COMPUTED. Optional. Retransmission flag. Derive: duplicate seq_raw with tcp_payload_len > 0 for same stream.

is_zero_window.description: COMPUTED. Optional. Zero window flag. Derive: win_value == 0.

initial_rtt.description: COMPUTED. Optional. SYN-to-SYN-ACK delta. Derive: timestamp_epoch(SYN-ACK) - timestamp_epoch(SYN) for same stream.

ack_rtt.description: COMPUTED. Optional. Per-packet RTT from data-to-ACK. Derive: match ack_raw to previous seq_raw+tcp_payload_len, diff timestamps.

bytes_in_flight.description: COMPUTED. Optional. Unacknowledged bytes in transit. Derive: max(seq_raw+tcp_payload_len) - max(ack_raw) per stream.
